scripts.dev: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts api dev -- pnpm dlx wrangler dev --config wrangler.jsonc --port 4006 --test-scheduled --var APP_ENV:development
scripts.dev:node: tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts api dev -- tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.deploy: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@app/api && tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts api deploy -- pnpm dlx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env=""
scripts.deploy:preview: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@app/api && tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts api deploy:preview -- bash scripts/deploy-preview.sh
scripts.deploy:staging: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@app/api && tsx ../../packages/infisical-runner/src/cli.ts api deploy:staging -- pnpm dlx wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging
scripts.docs:generate: pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@app/api... && tsx src/scripts/generate-api-docs.ts
